package.name: mode_manager
package.description:
mode_manager_node — fans out lifecycle change_state calls to the autonomy nodes (perception, slam, path_planning, control) and passes them the mission-specific strategy flag so each node knows which inner behaviour to run (trackdrive / autocross / accel / skidpad).
Exposes one service: `activate_mode` (custom srv) — request carries the mission name; reply tells mission_control_node whether every autonomy node reached `active`.
See docs/autonomy_pipeline.md §"Roles inside mission management".
